name: Riot Platforms, Inc.
summary: PARTI General We are a vertically integrated digital infrastructure company principally engaged in developing and optimizing our large-scale power assets. Our business centers on enhancing our electrical infrastructure and deploying it across two complementary platforms: (i) Bitcoin Mining and (ii) scalable data center solutions designed to support non-mining workloads.
